zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Champernowne於大約1376年出生在英國戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通時，她的父親Lord Richard II Champernoun33歲，母親Alice de Astley30歲。她於大約1398年與Sir James Chudleigh在英國戴文艾希頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1419年在英國英格蘭戴文聖 多馬享年44歲，埋葬在英國戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Champernowne于大约1376年出生在英国戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通时，她的父亲Lord Richard II Champernoun33岁，母亲Alice de Astley30岁。她于大约1398年与Sir James Chudleigh在英国戴文艾希頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1419年在英国英格兰戴文聖 多馬享年44岁，埋葬在英国戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通。

nameMeanings.name: Champernowne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Cambernon in Manche.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Champernowne was born about 1376, in Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England, her father, Lord Richard II Champernoun, was 33 and her mother, Alice de Astley, was 30. She married Sir James Chudleigh about 1398, in Ashton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1419, in St Thomas, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England.

fr.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Champernowne est née environ 1376, à Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Lord Richard II Champernoun, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice de Astley, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Chudleigh environ 1398, à Ashton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1419, à St Thomas, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Champernowne um 1376 in Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Richard II Champernoun 33 und ihre Mutter Alice de Astley 30. Sie hat um 1398 in Ashton, Devon, England Sir James Chudleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1419 im Alter von 44 Jahren in St Thomas, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Champernowne è nata il circa 1376 nel Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England, sua padre, Lord Richard II Champernoun, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Alice de Astley, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Chudleigh circa 1398, nel Ashton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1419, nel St Thomas, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Champernowneが約1376年にイギリスデボンバー フエレルズ ウィス バー アルストンで生まれた時，父Lord Richard II Champernounは33歳，母Alice de Astleyは30歳であった。約1398年にイギリスデボンアシュトンでSir James Chudleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1419年にイギリスイギリスデボンスト ソマスで44歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバー フエレルズ ウィス バー アルストンにて埋葬された。

ko.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Champernowne(이)가 대략 1376년 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Richard II Champernoun(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Astley(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 영국 데폰 애슈턴에서 Sir James Chudleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스트 톰아스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Champernowne nasceu aproximadamente 1376, em Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Richard II Champernoun, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Astley, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Chudleigh aproximadamente 1398, em Ashton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1419, em St Thomas, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Champernowne родилась около 1376 г. в местности бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Richard II Champernoun было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Astley, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Chudleigh около 1398 г. в местности аштон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1419 г. в местности ст томас, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия.

Se casó con Sir James Chudleigh aproximadamente 1398, en Ashton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1419, en St Thomas, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Inglaterra.
